description: Using the OpenKM document management interface in the browser, create a new folder called 'Security' under the root of the repository (okm:root). Inside the 'Security' folder, create two subfolders: 'Policies' and 'Audits'. Then move the document 'NIST_Cybersecurity_Framework.pdf' from the 'Reports' folder into the 'Security/Policies' subfolder, and move the document 'OWASP_Testing_Guide_Summary.pdf' from the 'Reports' folder into the 'Security/Audits' subfolder.
